nws_forecast.name: This Afternoon
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain before 5pm, then rain and snow. Cloudy. High near 55, with temperatures falling to around 41 in the afternoon. Northwest wind around 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
